component.name: Materializr
component.summary: 3D CAD for makers, between Tinkercad and FreeCAD

description.p: Materializr is open-source 3D CAD for makers — the middle ground between dead-simple tools like Tinkercad and full professional suites like FreeCAD. Enough genuine solid modeling to make real parts, without a steep learning curve, a subscription, or an account.

Sketch on a plane, pull it into a solid (extrude, revolve, loft, sweep), fillet and chamfer, run boolean operations, cut threads, and edit any step of the history later — even after closing and reopening the project.

Sketches export to SVG at 1:1 millimeters for laser cutters and 2.5D CNC. It also imports STEP and IGES, and exports STEP, STL, IGES and glTF. The geometry kernel is OpenCASCADE — real B-rep solids, not meshes.

ul.li: Sketch-based parametric modeling with an editable feature history
Extrude, revolve, loft, sweep, fillet, chamfer, shell, threads
STEP / IGES import; STEP / STL / IGES / glTF and 1:1 SVG export
Touch-capable UI for tablets and larger screens
Editing a fillet or chamfer now selects the right feature and stays editable after you cancel an edit.
Editing an early feature no longer deletes geometry on reloaded projects.

description.p: Move Hole, a light viewport theme, Repair Geometry, and a round of parametric-reliability and viewport fixes.
